transcript: The killer, a girl who deserves to die, begins by showing a fierce battle between a man named Bong Weegong against two delinquent youths who wanted to kill him. Despite being alone and unarmed, Weegong can easily defeat them. Not long after, a group of delinquent youths arrived at the place and were very surprised to see their two comrades who had been overthrown by Weegong. At the same time, he gets an incoming text message from his wife asking about a teenage girl he should be taking care of right now. In the message, his wife mentions that she hopes the girl is okay and that he can bond with her. The scene then switches to a few days earlier, where at that time, Wigong is relaxing at home reading a book. His wife, Hyunsoo, then came to him and expressed her desire to have a vacation to Jeju Island with her best friend and also to survey the location of the restaurant that she plans to build with her best friend. Yeon-soo, planning to go away for two weeks, then asked her husband to take care of her best friend's stepdaughter, a 17-year-old girl named Yoon-ji. Hearing his wife's request, he immediately raised his objection, saying he was not a nanny, especially when she said Yoon-ji would stay at their house for a while. Weegong gets into a small argument with his wife until he finally relents and agrees to her request to look after Yoon Ji during her business trip. The next day, he drives Hyun Soo and her best friend, Kim Soo Ah, to the airport and promises to look after Yoon Ji while they're away. At night, Weegong seems to have fallen asleep in his car while waiting for Yoon Ji, who has to take extra lessons after school. Yoonji then knocks on his car window, waking him up. He immediately tells her to get in his car and head home. However, she asks him to take her and her friend to Hongdae because they have something to buy there. Arriving at their destination, Yoonji tells Weigong that she wants to stay at her friend's house for a few days and begs him to keep it a secret from her mother. Without a second thought, he goes along with her wish, figuring he might be able to relax all the time without worrying about her well-being. Soon afterward, Weigong asks for Yunji's wallet and puts in some money before returning the wallet to her. Before she leaves with her friend, Weigong tells her not to hesitate to call him anytime, especially when she needs help. Not only that, but he also asks her to be careful and keep herself from getting involved in any trouble. After that, he rushed back to his house because he was very sleepy and wanted to sleep soon. Later at home, Weigong wakes up to the sound of his cell phone ringing, signaling an incoming call that turned out to be Yoonji. On the other end of the phone, she sounds in pain and begs him to come somewhere soon. Thinking that Yoonji needs help, Weigong rushes his car to the location she told him on his phone. However, when he gets there, how surprised he is when he finds out that Yoon-ji is fine and is currently chatting casually with a man. Seeing Wee-gang's arrival, Yoon-ji immediately introduced him to the man, who she said that Wee-gang was her uncle. She then tells him that the man is her senior in school. Shortly after the man leaves them, Wee-gang asks why she is still hanging around at this late night, even though she said she wants to stay at the friend's house tonight. However, Yoonji completely ignores Weigong's questions and gets engrossed in her smartphone, which makes him irritated at her for daring to play with him. Weigong then asks her to come home, but she refuses, saying she's going to her friend's house. Weigong, annoyed, decides to leave and return home to continue his sleep. But then, he sees Yoonji riding a motorcycle ridden by a man she says is her senior. He didn't want to care about her anymore. Suddenly, Hyunsoo sends a text message asking how Yoonji is. Because of that, Weegong turns the car around and trails her with the tracking device he had previously tucked into her purse when he put some money in her pocket. Yoonji is taken by that man to a closed ice skating rink and then brings her in front of Song Yeon, a girl involved in criminal things, where she uses handsome boys to seduce several young girls to get them to date. After that, Song Yeon would kidnap and force the young girls to become hookers and profit from them. Yoon Ji and her friend have apparently been targeted by Song Yeon and could easily fall into her trap of using handsome boys to seduce them. Yoon-ji's friend seems to be in tears and begs Song-yeon to release them, but she doesn't care at all and instead slaps the girl. Meanwhile, Yoon-ji tries to fight her, but her efforts are in vain. Shortly afterward, Wee-gang, who finally arrived there, asked Song-yeon to free Yoon-ji and her friend and threatened to beat Song-yeon and her henchmen. However, she ignores his warnings and orders her henchmen to attack him. With his fighting skills, the delinquent youths who are Song Yeon's men are by no means a match for Wee Gong, who can easily take them all down. Even when she stabs him in the stomach, he still stands tall and retaliates for her by knocking her unconscious. He then takes Yoon Ji home and asks her to rest. The next day, Yoon Ji, looking curiously at Wee Gong, asked about his work since he lived in a mansion, and it was luxurious. He simply says that he has a fairly successful business in property and asks her not to ask personal questions. In the evening, Wee Gong invites Yoon Ji to dinner at a restaurant. On their way home from there, they pass by the location of the skating rink, the place where he beat up Song Yeon and her henchmen. Surprisingly, the arena had been lined with police lines, and many police officers passed Thanks for watching! from there, they'd pass by the location of the skating rink, the place where he beat up Song Yeon and her henchmen. Surprisingly, the arena had been lined with police lines, and many police officers passed by, indicating that something had happened there. Several policemen stopped vehicles passing through the location, including a policeman named Lee Yong-ho, who stopped Weigong's car. Yong-ho informs Weigong that there has been a murder at the ice skating rink and asks him a few things. He looks relaxed to answer every question the policeman asks. However, Yoonji acted strangely, as if she was hiding something, and was afraid that the police would find out. When he finally got home, Weigong rushed to find out about the murder case at the ice skating rink and was very surprised to find out that the victims were young delinquents who had been badly beaten by him the day before. On the other hand, Yoon Ji, who is in her room, looks very upset and sends someone a text message, and was very surprised to learn that the victims were young delinquents who had been beaten up by Wee Gong the day before. The following day, Young Ho goes to Wee Gong's house and asks about his alibi at the time of the murder because through the CCTV footage around the crime scene, his car was seen passing through the street 30 minutes before the murder occurred. Not only that, but Yong Ho also managed to find CCTV camera footage showing Yoon Ji driving with one of the victims of the murder, where the man, as well as other victims, turned out to be her schoolmates. However, Wee Gong refuses to go into detail, so Yong Ho becomes suspicious of him and questions his relationship with a teenage girl like Yoon Ji. He tells the policeman that he was only asked to help look after her while her mother and his wife are on a business trip to Jeju Island. He then asks Yeon Ho for clearer evidence of his and Yoon Ji's involvement in the murder case first, and if he has, he can formally interrogate them. After Yeon Ho leaves, Wee Gong then goes to Yoon Ji and asks her to tell the truth if she knows something about the murder of her schoolmates. After learning about her current situation, Wee Gong is reminded of the past when he met a girl who wanted to end her life. He wanted to know what she wanted, and then she asked for a hug from him, which he did, and after that, she lost consciousness. Wee Gong is distracted from his past memories when he hears Yoon Ji's cell phone ringing, which turns out to be an incoming call from Song Yeon. Knowing that Song Yeon was on the phone, he grabbed Yoon Ji's cell phone to talk to her. Song Yeon wants to tell Wee Gong that she has the knife with his fingerprints, which could be trouble for him if it is turned to the police. Since she threatens to hand over the knife to the police, Wee Gong is forced to agree to her request to meet her within an hour. He then asks Yoon Ji to stay home while he goes to see Song Yeon. Yoon Ji is scared because she will be alone at home, then forced to come along, but Wee Gong says she will make things difficult for him and gives her a bracelet with a tracking device just in case a bad thing happens. After that, Wee Gong rushed to prepare his weapons to face the worst. On the other hand, Song Yeon feels great after successfully threatening him. However, Song Yeon does not know that Wee Gong is a former professional killer who is very feared in the crime world, not only in South Korea, but also across the globe. Knowing that she kept Yoon Ji's wallet with a tracking device, he rushed to her whereabouts. Wee Gong finally arrives at an apartment, where he meets a man named Jong, Song Yeon's cousin and the person who runs an illegal business involving underage girls. He then summons one of his large, tall men to confront Weeong. However, he had made a big mistake by underestimating Weigong, who did not hesitate to beat and torture his men. On the other hand, Songyeon, who hears the commotion, then rushes out and is very surprised to see Weigong's presence there. He asks Songyeon to hand over the knife with his fingerprints on it, but she and Jeong make things worse by pointing guns at Weigong. Jeong finally hands the knife to him and rushes off with Seungyeon. Taking the knife, Weigong immediately chases after them but loses track when entering a dimly lit room. At that place, Weigong faces a man whose fighting ability is almost on par with his. He was involved in a fierce battle with the man until finally, the man chose to run away after Weigong managed to injure him badly. After the fight, Weigong rushes home and finds that his house has been burglarized by a group of people who came to kidnap Yoonji. He immediately tracked her whereabouts with a tracking device until finally arriving at an apartment building that was used as a location to conduct an illegal business involving underage girls. Weigong hears a girl scream from one of the rooms, and it turns out that the girl is Yoonji's friend, whom a boy almost beats her up. He then saves her and asks where Yoon Ji was. On the other hand, Song Yeon, who turns out to be there too, notices Wee Gong's arrival and rushes away. However, he manages to stop her and forces her to tell her where Yoon Ji is. Since Song Yeon refuses to say anything about Yoon Ji, Wee Gong is forced to tie her up and torture her to get information about Yoon Ji and her criminal gang. Song Yeon reveals that they deliberately involve underage girls in launching the illegal business run by Jong, where they then hired the young girls to seduce adult men, then blackmailed the men for giving them pleasure. To smooth their business, Jong and his gang have teamed up with some corrupt cops and share the profits with them. Song Yeon reveals to Wee Gong that Yoo Jin and several other young girls will be sent to Russia to become a hooker and tells him the address of a hotel where Jong is holding them before taking them to Russia. Not long after, Yong Ho arrives there after getting a report from a resident who heard the commotion in the place. When he enters the apartment, he is surprised to see Song Yeon already seriously injured, and Wee Gong is nowhere to be seen. Meanwhile, Wee Gong finally arrives at the hotel and fights with the delinquent youth seen at the film's beginning. Even alone, he can easily kill a group of people with sharp weapons and has precise marksmanship, so it doesn't take long for Weigong to kill the thugs who get in his way. Weigong then asks about Yoonji from the three surviving delinquents and doesn't hesitate to kill them when they can't share the information he wants. Soon after, a blonde-haired man appeared and introduced himself as Yuri. Yuri, of Russian descent, turns out to be a man who once fought against Weigong in Zhang's place. Yuri reveals himself as a professional assassin who works for the Russian mafia and tells Weigong that Yunji will be taken to Russia on a ship that leaves at 8 o'clock tomorrow morning. Knowing that he didn't have much time because it was already early in the morning, Weigong had other plans to deal with him. Weigong rushes back into the hotel and again engages in a fierce battle with Yuri. However, during the fight, he traps Yuri, then recklessly jumps from the upstairs window and falls right on top of Yongho's car, which managed to track his footsteps at that place. Yongho immediately points a gun at Weigong and accuses him of murdering Seonhyun and the man at the ice skating rink some time ago. Weigong faces the accusations as calmly as ever until he finally grabs Yongho's gun and turns to threaten him. Since it's already morning, he is forced to handcuff Yongho and Yuri to the car while he drives it at high speed to save Yoonji. Long story short, Weigong arrives at the port just before Yoonji is brought into a ship about to leave for Russia. He immediately kills the gangsters who kidnapped her and saves her. But then, Zhang arrives there and intends to kill him by bumping into him. Weigong manages to dodge, then urges Zhang to reveal the mastermind behind all this. Because he is reluctant to reveal any information about his plot, Weigong immediately kills him. Seeing Weigong, who doesn't hesitate to kill other people, Yongho finally realizes that Weigong is no ordinary man. Weigong then takes Jong's cell phone and learns that Yongho turns out to be a corrupt cop who has been working with Jong and his gang to launch their illegal business. After finding evidence of Yongho's involvement with Jong and his gang, Weigong threatens him and asks Yongho to do all his orders if he doesn't want the evidence handed over to other policemen. Since Yongho doesn't want his career as a policeman to end like that, he finally complies with Weigong's wishes so that Weigong is acquitted of all charges. Afterward, Yoonji is rushed to the hospital for intensive care, and Weigong accompanies her while she is there. He then asks her to tell the police what really happened. She then blames herself for all the bad things that happened to him and her friend. Weigong calms her down, reassuring Yoon-ji that everything that happened wasn't her mistake, and asks her to rest and focus on her recovery. Not long after, Yong-ho meets Weigong at the hospital. He said he had already found out about Yong-ho colluding with Jong when he accidentally saw Song-yeon's body in his car. Weigong concluded that it was Yong-ho who killed Song-yeon to frame him. Weigong then asks Yong-ho to find out about the Russian mafia syndicate that wants Yoon Ji and the other young girls. At first, Yong Ho refuses his request because it's too risky. But Yong Ho has no choice but to obey him because Wee Gong has the evidence to destroy his career as a police officer. A few days later, Wee Gong meets Hyun Joo, an arms dealer who used to be his partner but decides to retire early due to an injury to his leg. Weigong enlists his help in finding a sniper rifle and a silencer gun. Hearing this, he looks surprised because he thinks that Weigong has retired completely. Weigong says he has a small problem to solve and needs the weapons ASAP. That evening, Weigong gets a call from Youngho telling him about Park, a member of the criminal syndicate tasked with sending young girls to Russia, including Yoonji. On the other hand, Park was furious when he found out that his men had been killed and the police had found out about his illegal activities. Because of that, he packed up his belongings and rushed out of place. However, Weigang turned out to have arrived there first and immediately killed all of Park's men who were guarding the place without experiencing the slightest difficulty, even killing them all while drinking coffee. Weigong finally manages to corner Park and forces him to reveal information about his criminal syndicate. Park was initially reluctant to say anything to him, but Weigong pointed out his gun. Finally, Park reveals that he and his gang, who turns out to be a woman nicknamed Pig Mama, provide young girls to grown men who are willing to pay a high price to satisfy their desires. However, their customers are not random people but high-ranking government officials and wealthy businessmen. Soon, Park and his gang are asked to provide at least five young girls to serve a chief justice named Kim. Park and Pig Mama usually target high school girls who are still unstable and lure them with some money before finally trapping them into the circle of illegal things. She also works with criminal syndicates from Russia and conducts exchanges with them, in which they also send young girls from Russia to become a hooker in South Korea. After killing Park, Weegong calls someone and asks him to come there immediately. Not long after, a group of people, led by a man named Taehyun, finally arrived and cleaned up the crime scene and got rid of the bodies of Park and all his men. Taehyun looks surprised when he gets a call from Weegong because he should have retired from his job as a professional killer. He tells Taehyun that he will need Taehyun and his team's services soon. He needs a big group to help him, and there will be murders to be committed outside the city. At first, Taehyun refuses Weegong's request, but after he offers to pay Taehyun three times over, he finally agrees. The next day, Weegong finally gets the weapon he wanted and goes straight to testing it at Hyunjoo's place. After that, he meets Yoonji at the hospital, who is devastated when she finds out that her friend, also a victim, chose to end her life. While at the hospital, Weegong calls Youngho and asks about Yoonji's past, who was adopted by Sui after her biological mother died when she was five years old. Yongho also tells Weegong about Kim, who turns out to be from a fairly well-known family, and has such strong political influence, that it would be impossible for Weegong to put him in jail. However, Weegong doesn't care because he will not send Kim to prison. Instead, he will send Kim straight to hell. Yongho also tells Weigong that Kim will have a party at a luxurious mansion in a special area belonging to his family so that his depraved actions will not be caught by anyone. Long story short, when Kim was busy partying with sexy women, Weigong immediately took action to kill all his men who were guarding the place with the sniper rifle he bought from Hyunjoo. On the other hand, Yuri, who worked for Kim, immediately knew someone had barged in there because he couldn't contact his subordinates who were guarding outside the mansion. Wee Gong, who had managed to infiltrate the mansion, then engaged in a gun battle with Yuri's men, who attacked him simultaneously. At the same time, Yong Ho, who was also there, pointed a gun at Weigong and threatened to kill him because Yongho had now sided with Kim and Yuri. Turned out, Weigong could easily beat them, but he allowed himself to be caught to be brought in front of Kim. After that, he is led into a room where Kim is seen with a teenage girl who looks very depressed and wants to run away. Not long after, Yongho tells Weigong that he's not afraid of Weigong handing over evidence of his involvement with Jong and his gang because Kim has promised to help him by taking advantage of his connections with the police and the prosecution. We'll be right back. Weigong that he's not afraid of Weigong handing over evidence of his involvement with Jong and his gang because Kim has promised to help him by taking advantage of his connections with the police and the prosecution. Weigong isn't surprised by Yongho's words, having anticipated this, and is as calm as ever. After Yongho and all his men take him away from there, Kim immediately drags the girl into his room, where he will satisfy his desires for the teenage girl. At the same time, Weigong finally fights back, bringing down Yongho and Kim's men with great ease. Soon afterward, Weigong took Yongho's gun and did not hesitate to kill him because Yongho had dared to betray him. Weigong didn't give any mercy to Kim's men and immediately killed them all. Not long after, Yuri arrived there, and the two of them were again involved in a fierce one-on-one fight. This time, they must determine the victor of the deadly battle, and Weegong can't be defeated easily, neither can Yuri, who is also a professional killer. With weapons or relying solely on martial skills, the two had almost equal strength and a very strong determination to defeat each other. However, after going through a fierce and deadly battle, Weegong was finally able to overpower Yuri and dropped his body into the middle of the party, which made everyone scream in fear and flee in panic. On the other hand, Kim, who still doesn't know that all his men have been killed by Weigong, looked happy because he thought he would have fun all night. However, how surprised he was when he found Weigong already in his room holding a gun. Kim calls his men, but Weigong says no one will come since he killed them all. Kim then tries to deal with Weigong, promising that Kim will make him immune from the law so that he can freely carry out his illegal activities. Weigong seems interested in Kim's offer but then says he's long retired from his dirty work and is now a good citizen by paying taxes on time and running a legitimate business. Afterward, Weigong asks Kim to reveal about Pig Mama, who turns out to be Soo Ah. Kim said that Soo Ah had the heart to sell her adoptive daughter, Yoon Ji, to make big profits from the illegal business. After getting the information, Wee Gong got up and was about to leave. At that point, Kim thinks he's safe, and Wee Gong won't kill him. But then, Wee Gong turned around and shot him laughing so hard that Kim finally died. Sometime later, Soo Ah, who was having lunch with Hyun Soo on Jeju Island, was surprised by an incoming call from Kim. She briefly said goodbye to Hyun Soo to answer the call from him. She then gets into her car and answers the phone call. Unexpectedly, the one who called Soo Ah was not Kim, but Wee Gong, who turned out to be waiting for her in his car. He told her that Kim had died in her criminal gangs, including Park and Jong. Wee Gong had already guessed that Soo Ah was after him from the start and then pointed a gun at her head. He is really annoyed with her because she dared to involve his wife. Sua turns out to have conspired with Yongho to frame Weegong and blackmail him for harassing Yoonji, a teenage girl. However, in the end, he destroys Sua's criminal syndicate and topples Kim's power. After that, Weegong asks Sua to drive somewhere and says that from now on, he and his wife will take care of Yoonji until she grows up and can live independently. When they finally arrive at an uninhabited location, Weegong shoots Sua in the head, killing her. After killing Sua, Weegong then got out of the car and walked home, while from the opposite direction, a van was seen driving up to his car. They are Taehyun and his team in charge of cleaning up the murder and removing her body. Later, Weegong meets Hyunsoo, enjoying the sunset on the beach, and tells his wife that he kept his promise to take care of Yoonji, and took her on vacation with them. The film ends with Hyunsoo smiling at Weegong and then hugging her husband. It is also revealed that the teenage girl who appeared in Weegong's flashback is Hyunsoo. The moral that we can learn from this film is that bad intentions and greed will bring us misery. Plus, never leave our children with someone we don't really know the background of, because it could be that person is a former assassin who just wants to relax. We'll see you next time.

Yoon Ji is scared because she will be alone at home, then forced to come along, but Wee Gong says she will make things difficult for him and gives her a bracelet with a tracking device just in case a bad thing happens. After that, Wee Gong rushed to prepare his weapons to face the worst. On the other hand, Song Yeon feels great after successfully threatening him. However, Song Yeon does not know that Wee Gong is a former professional killer who is very feared in the crime world, not only in South Korea, but also across the globe. Knowing that she kept Yoon Ji's wallet with a tracking device, he rushed to her whereabouts. Wee Gong finally arrives at an apartment, where he meets a man named Jong, Song Yeon's cousin and the person who runs an illegal business involving underage girls. He then summons one of his large, tall men to confront Weeong. However, he had made a big mistake by underestimating Weigong, who did not hesitate to beat and torture his men. On the other hand, Songyeon, who hears the commotion, then rushes out and is very surprised to see Weigong's presence there. He asks Songyeon to hand over the knife with his fingerprints on it, but she and Jeong make things worse by pointing guns at Weigong. Jeong finally hands the knife to him and rushes off with Seungyeon. Taking the knife, Weigong immediately chases after them but loses track when entering a dimly lit room. At that place, Weigong faces a man whose fighting ability is almost on par with his. He was involved in a fierce battle with the man until finally, the man chose to run away after Weigong managed to injure him badly. After the fight, Weigong rushes home and finds that his house has been burglarized by a group of people who came to kidnap Yoonji. He immediately tracked her whereabouts with a tracking device until finally arriving at an apartment building that was used as a location to conduct an illegal business involving underage girls. Weigong hears a girl scream from one of the rooms, and it turns out that the girl is Yoonji's friend, whom a boy almost beats her up. He then saves her and asks where Yoon Ji was. On the other hand, Song Yeon, who turns out to be there too, notices Wee Gong's arrival and rushes away. However, he manages to stop her and forces her to tell her where Yoon Ji is. Since Song Yeon refuses to say anything about Yoon Ji, Wee Gong is forced to tie her up and torture her to get information about Yoon Ji and her criminal gang. Song Yeon reveals that they deliberately involve underage girls in launching the illegal business run by Jong, where they then hired the young girls to seduce adult men, then blackmailed the men for giving them pleasure. To smooth their business, Jong and his gang have teamed up with some corrupt cops and share the profits with them. Song Yeon reveals to Wee Gong that Yoo Jin and several other young girls will be sent to Russia to become a hooker and tells him the address of a hotel where Jong is holding them before taking them to Russia. Not long after, Yong Ho arrives there after getting a report from a resident who heard the commotion in the place. When he enters the apartment, he is surprised to see Song Yeon already seriously injured, and Wee Gong is nowhere to be seen. Meanwhile, Wee Gong finally arrives at the hotel and fights with the delinquent youth seen at the film's beginning. Even alone, he can easily kill a group of people with sharp weapons and has precise marksmanship, so it doesn't take long for Weigong to kill the thugs who get in his way. Weigong then asks about Yoonji from the three surviving delinquents and doesn't hesitate to kill them when they can't share the information he wants. Soon after, a blonde-haired man appeared and introduced himself as Yuri. Yuri, of Russian descent, turns out to be a man who once fought against Weigong in Zhang's place. Yuri reveals himself as a professional assassin who works for the Russian mafia and tells Weigong that Yunji will be taken to Russia on a ship that leaves at 8 o'clock tomorrow morning. Knowing that he didn't have much time because it was already early in the morning, Weigong had other plans to deal with him. Weigong rushes back into the hotel and again engages in a fierce battle with Yuri. However, during the fight, he traps Yuri, then recklessly jumps from the upstairs window and falls right on top of Yongho's car, which managed to track his footsteps at that place. Yongho immediately points a gun at Weigong and accuses him of murdering Seonhyun and the man at the ice skating rink some time ago. Weigong faces the accusations as calmly as ever until he finally grabs Yongho's gun and turns to threaten him. Since it's already morning, he is forced to handcuff Yongho and Yuri to the car while he drives it at high speed to save Yoonji. Long story short, Weigong arrives at the port just before Yoonji is brought into a ship about to leave for Russia. He immediately kills the gangsters who kidnapped her and saves her. But then, Zhang arrives there and intends to kill him by bumping into him. Weigong manages to dodge, then urges Zhang to reveal the mastermind behind all this. Because he is reluctant to reveal any information about his plot, Weigong immediately kills him. Seeing Weigong, who doesn't hesitate to kill other people, Yongho finally realizes that Weigong is no ordinary man. Weigong then takes Jong's cell phone and learns that Yongho turns out to be a corrupt cop who has been working with Jong and his gang to launch their illegal business. After finding evidence of Yongho's involvement with Jong and his gang, Weigong threatens him and asks Yongho to do all his orders if he doesn't want the evidence handed over to other policemen. Since Yongho doesn't want his career as a policeman to end like that, he finally complies with Weigong's wishes so that Weigong is acquitted of all charges. Afterward, Yoonji is rushed to the hospital for intensive care, and Weigong accompanies her while she is there. He then asks her to tell the police what really happened. She then blames herself for all the bad things that happened to him and her friend.
Weigong calms her down, reassuring Yoon-ji that everything that happened wasn't her mistake,
and asks her to rest and focus on her recovery.
Not long after, Yong-ho meets Weigong at the hospital.
He said he had already found out about Yong-ho colluding with Jong when he accidentally saw
Song-yeon's body in his car.
Weigong concluded that it was Yong-ho who killed Song-yeon to frame him.

Weigong then asks Yong-ho to find out about the Russian mafia syndicate that wants Yoon Ji and the other young girls. At first, Yong Ho refuses his request because it's too risky. But Yong Ho has no choice but to obey him because Wee Gong has the evidence to destroy his career as a police officer. A few days later, Wee Gong meets Hyun Joo, an arms dealer who used to be his partner but decides to retire early due to an injury to his leg. Weigong enlists his help in finding a sniper rifle and a silencer gun. Hearing this, he looks surprised because he thinks that Weigong has retired completely. Weigong says he has a small problem to solve and needs the weapons ASAP. That evening, Weigong gets a call from Youngho telling him about Park, a member of the criminal syndicate tasked with sending young girls to Russia, including Yoonji. On the other hand, Park was furious when he found out that his men had been killed and the police had found out about his illegal activities. Because of that, he packed up his belongings and rushed out of place. However, Weigang turned out to have arrived there first and immediately killed all of Park's men who were guarding the place without experiencing the slightest difficulty, even killing them all while drinking coffee. Weigong finally manages to corner Park and forces him to reveal information about his criminal syndicate. Park was initially reluctant to say anything to him, but Weigong pointed out his gun. Finally, Park reveals that he and his gang, who turns out to be a woman nicknamed Pig Mama, provide young girls to grown men who are willing to pay a high price to satisfy their desires. However, their customers are not random people but high-ranking government officials and wealthy businessmen. Soon, Park and his gang are asked to provide at least five young girls to serve a chief justice named Kim. Park and Pig Mama usually target high school girls who are still unstable and lure them with some money before finally trapping them into the circle of illegal things. She also works with criminal syndicates from Russia and conducts exchanges with them, in which they also send young girls from Russia to become a hooker in South Korea. After killing Park, Weegong calls someone and asks him to come there immediately. Not long after, a group of people, led by a man named Taehyun, finally arrived and cleaned up the

crime scene and got rid of the bodies of Park and all his men. Taehyun looks surprised when he gets a call from Weegong because he should have retired from his job as a professional killer. He tells Taehyun that he will need Taehyun and his team's services soon. He needs a big group to help him, and there will be murders to be committed outside the city. At first, Taehyun refuses Weegong's request, but after he offers to pay Taehyun three times over, he finally agrees. The next day, Weegong finally gets the weapon he wanted and goes straight to testing it at Hyunjoo's place. After that, he meets Yoonji at the hospital, who is devastated when she finds out that her friend, also a victim, chose to end her life. While at the hospital, Weegong calls Youngho and asks about Yoonji's past, who was adopted by Sui after her biological mother died when she was five years old. Yongho also tells Weegong about Kim, who turns out to be from a fairly well-known family, and has such strong political influence, that it would be impossible for Weegong to put him in jail. However, Weegong doesn't care because he will not send Kim to prison. Instead, he will send Kim straight to hell. Yongho also tells Weigong that Kim will have a party at a luxurious mansion in a special area belonging to his family so that his depraved actions will not be caught by anyone. Long story short, when Kim was busy partying with sexy women, Weigong immediately took action to kill all his men who were guarding the place with the sniper rifle he bought from Hyunjoo. On the other hand, Yuri, who worked for Kim, immediately knew someone had barged in there because he couldn't contact his subordinates who were guarding outside the mansion. Wee Gong, who had managed to infiltrate the mansion, then engaged in a gun battle with Yuri's men, who attacked him simultaneously. At the same time, Yong Ho, who was also there, pointed a gun at Weigong and threatened to kill him because Yongho had now sided with Kim and Yuri.
Turned out, Weigong could easily beat them, but he allowed himself to be caught to be brought in front of Kim.
After that, he is led into a room where Kim is seen with a teenage girl who looks very depressed and wants to run away.

Not long after, Yongho tells Weigong that he's not afraid of Weigong handing over evidence of his involvement with Jong and his gang because Kim has promised to help him by taking advantage of his connections with the police and the prosecution.

We'll be right back. Weigong that he's not afraid of Weigong handing over evidence of his involvement with Jong and his gang because Kim has promised to help him by taking advantage of his connections with the police and the prosecution. Weigong isn't surprised by Yongho's words, having anticipated this, and is as calm as ever. After Yongho and all his men take him away from there, Kim immediately drags the girl into his room, where he will satisfy his desires for the teenage girl. At the same time, Weigong finally fights back, bringing down Yongho and Kim's men with great ease. Soon afterward, Weigong took Yongho's gun and did not hesitate to kill him because Yongho had dared to betray him. Weigong didn't give any mercy to Kim's men and immediately killed them all. Not long after, Yuri arrived there, and the two of them were again involved in a fierce one-on-one fight. This time, they must determine the victor of the deadly battle, and Weegong can't be defeated easily, neither can Yuri, who is also a professional killer. With weapons or relying solely on martial skills, the two had almost equal strength and a very strong determination to defeat each other. However, after going through a fierce and deadly battle, Weegong was finally able to overpower Yuri and dropped his body into the middle of the party, which made everyone scream in fear and flee in panic. On the other hand, Kim, who still doesn't know that all his men have been killed by Weigong, looked happy because he thought he would have fun all night. However, how surprised he was when he found Weigong already in his room holding a gun. Kim calls his men, but Weigong says no one will come since he killed them all. Kim then tries to deal with Weigong, promising that Kim will make him immune from the law so that he can freely carry out his illegal activities. Weigong seems interested in Kim's offer but then says he's long retired from his dirty work and is now a good citizen by paying taxes on time and running a legitimate business. Afterward, Weigong asks Kim to reveal about Pig Mama, who turns out to be Soo Ah. Kim said that Soo Ah had the heart to sell her adoptive daughter, Yoon Ji, to make big profits from the illegal business. After getting the information, Wee Gong got up and was about to leave. At that point, Kim thinks he's safe, and Wee Gong won't kill him. But then, Wee Gong turned around and shot him laughing so hard that Kim finally died. Sometime later, Soo Ah, who was having lunch with Hyun Soo on Jeju Island, was surprised by an incoming call from Kim. She briefly said goodbye to Hyun Soo to answer the call from him. She then gets into her car and answers the phone call. Unexpectedly, the one who called Soo Ah was not Kim, but Wee Gong, who turned out to be waiting for her in his car. He told her that Kim had died in her criminal gangs, including Park and Jong. Wee Gong had already guessed that Soo Ah was after him from the start and then pointed a gun at her head. He is really annoyed with her because she dared to involve his wife. Sua turns out to have conspired with Yongho to frame Weegong and blackmail him for harassing Yoonji, a teenage girl. However, in the end, he destroys Sua's criminal syndicate and topples Kim's power. After that, Weegong asks Sua to drive somewhere and says that from now on, he and his wife will take care of Yoonji until she grows up and can live independently. When they finally arrive at an uninhabited location, Weegong shoots Sua in the head, killing her. After killing Sua, Weegong then got out of the car and walked home, while from the opposite direction, a van was seen driving up to his car. They are Taehyun and his team in charge of cleaning up the murder and removing her body. Later, Weegong meets Hyunsoo, enjoying the sunset on the beach, and tells his wife that he kept his promise to take care of Yoonji, and took her on vacation with them. The film ends with Hyunsoo smiling at Weegong and then hugging her husband. It is also revealed that the teenage girl who appeared in Weegong's flashback is Hyunsoo. The moral that we can learn from this film is that bad intentions and greed will bring us misery.
Plus, never leave our children with someone we don't really know the background of,
because it could be that person is a former assassin who just wants to relax. We'll see you next time.
